top_signals.title: Traders Keep Bets on a Fed Hike in 2026 After CPI Data
top_signals.summary:
Bond traders maintained bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates by the end of the year, even after a soft US core inflation reading eased pressure on Chairman Kevin Warsh to act sooner. 
Sree Kochugovindan, Senior Research Economist at Aberdeen, discusses the path forward for the Fed, as well as what's in store for other central banks. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says U.S. will attack Iran 'very hard'
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB moved to rein in Revolut’s ‘self-guided missiles’ in Europe
top_signals.summary: Europe’s most valuable fintech was ordered to address ‘deficiencies’ in oversight amid a rapid product rollout
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The quantum clock is ticking: it's Bitcoin's problem, not Ethereum's
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump pledges more Iran attacks, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard'
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mastercard prepares for a future where AI agents make payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apollo and Blackstone’s Large Lending Model
top_signals.summary: The private capital groups have finalised a complex $35bn deal that will help finance Anthropic’s growth plans
